  - Entry to EN service pages inside Click First™
- Small Business SEO : https://monsieurclick.com/small-business-seo
  - Local SEO for owners: Maps, website foundations, AI visibility
- Generative Engine Optimization (GEO) : https://monsieurclick.com/services/generative-engine-optimization
  - Get cited by ChatGPT, Gemini, Claude, Perplexity (Schema, OKF, llms.txt)
- SEO services : https://monsieurclick.com/services/seo
  - Technical, on-page and content SEO measured inside Click First™
- SEO audit : https://monsieurclick.com/services/seo-audit
  - Technical, on-page and semantic audit with prioritized action plan

  - Google Business Profile, reviews, citations and local pages
